package.name: rdump
package.summary: In-process self-memory dump in reli's RDUMP format.
package.description:
ext-rdump writes the calling PHP process's own memory into reli's (reliforp/reli-prof) RDUMP dump-file format from inside the process, without ptrace or process_vm_readv.
It exposes rdump_dump(string $path, bool $full = false), resolves executor_globals / compiler_globals / basic_globals by their real addresses (working on both NTS and ZTS, PHP 7.0+), reads /proc/self/maps and copies the relevant regions straight out of its own address space. The output is byte-compatible with reli's MemoryDumpWriter and can be analysed offline with `reli inspector:memory:analyze` / `reli inspector:memory:dump:inspect`.
